narrative:
Union East (precinct in Fayette County) has 422 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points.
